titleStmt.title: SII 18.96: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 96. (B.K. No. 173 of 1933-34.) KAṆṆUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama Year 10, Śukla, Pushya śu. 2, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti The date is wrong. The 10th year of Vikramāditya VI did not coincide with the cyclic year S11ukla. The given details correspond to A.D. 1089, December 7, Friday, on which day there was no Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The characters of the record also do not belong to the period of Vikramāditya VI. Below this are engraved three more records, the last of which belongs to the time of the Kalachurya king Bijjaḷa It appears that all these records were engraved during the latters' period.

It registers a grant of land made at Kannavūri to god Svayambhu-Chaṇḍēśvara of the village which was situated in the division of Taddavāḍi One-thousand. The grant was made by Mahāpradhāna Kannapayya, after requesting the king. Kannavūri is stated to be in the enjoyment of the donor as his of (prabhu-sāmya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpritvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva
vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkka
tārambaraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḻu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁ geyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḻappa samadhigatapaṁcama
hāsabda cōḷasamaṁntādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ dina
nāthanaṭanagnavidvajjanapaḷapradāyaka paṇḍitajanakumudavanasudhākara
vipradivākaranaṇna maccaripa daṇḍanāyakasirōvajradaṁḍa duṣṭa
ra gaṁḍa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara pādārādhaka parabaḷasādhaka
nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāsēnādhipati
mahāpradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ kaṁnapayyaṁgaḻu cāḻukyavi
kramakālada 10 neya sukla saṁvatsarada pusya suddha 2 [Ā]dityavāra
daṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiparvva nimittadiṁ carkravarttige
binnapaṁgeydu taddavāḍisāyiradoḷage tanna prabhu sāmyadū
ru kannavoriya śrī svayaṁbhu caṁḍēśvaradēvargge
Ūriṁdaṁ teṁkalu hiriya haḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu mare
kanahaḷḷiya kolana mēreIṁ baḍagalu māṇikēsvarada kōla
laḷedu sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 300 gadde māṇikēsvara
da kōla mattaru 1 dēvariṁ baḍaga pūvina tōṭa mattaru 1
vūroḷage mane 1 gāṇa 1 dēvariṁ teṁkalu kare 1 ©
Digital edition of SII 18.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
